payload.other: This profile is being used to calibrate a desktop AI assistant. Key context: I am a highly technical, self-directed learner in my early-to-mid 20s based in Sacramento, CA. I have no formal employment history but have deep expertise in AI systems, Gemini CLI, autonomous agents, web development, and DevOps. I recently completed my GED and am enrolled in the Next Chapter technical program. My workflow involves heavy use of multiple AI platforms simultaneously (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini), Windows PowerShell/PowerToys, VS Code, WSL, Docker, and GitHub. I work primarily late nights with intensive multi-terminal sessions. My hobbies include fitness (weight training, boxing, HIIT), Magic: The Gathering, and music (Devil May Cry/Hazbin Hotel soundtracks). I am focused on breaking into the AI/tech industry and building autonomous AI systems. I prefer free/open-source tools and minimal-cost resources. I document in Obsidian and Google Drive. My learning is almost entirely self-directed through hands-on experimentation.
payload.skills: Advanced AI/LLM integration and prompt engineering, building agentic AI systems (CrewAI, autonomous agents), CLI tools and command-line workflow optimization, Windows PowerShell and system administration, web scraping and data extraction, deep research methodology, JavaScript/TypeScript/Python/PowerShell/Bash scripting, Git version control, Docker and containerization, VS Code extension configuration, rapid self-directed learning across complex technical domains, strategic thinking (Magic: The Gathering), fitness training and workout programming
payload.medical: None reported. Actively maintains physical health through weight training, HIIT, Zone 2 cardio, Stairmaster, and incline treadmill work. Compound movements and circuit training are regular habits.

payload.careerGoal: AI/ML engineering, autonomous systems development, full-stack AI integration, DevOps/system architecture, technical research and deep-dive analysis, AI tooling developer, prompt engineer, or building my own AI startup/products. Long-term: leading AI projects or founding a tech venture.
payload.incomegoal: $2,000 - $3,000/month to cover basics comfortably in Sacramento
payload.priorities: 1. Complete Next Chapter technical program pre-course and advance to full enrollment | 2. Secure first paying technical role or freelance income from AI/development skills | 3. Obtain technical certifications (CompTIA, Google Cloud, or AI-related certs) to formalize skill set
